text: 6. PRIME CONTRACT: The "Prime Contract" is the contract between the Owner and the Contractor for the Project. The term "Prime Contract" includes the plans, specifications, general conditions, any and all special terms and conditions, addenda, and all other  contract  documents  which  are  incorporated  into  that  agreement  by  its  terms.  Each  exhibit  attached  hereto  or  referred  to herein (including any documents incorporated therein) is incorporated herein in its entirety for all purposes as if copied at length and attached hereto. The Prime Contract and the Subcontract, including all exhibits, constitute the Subcontract Documents. In the event of a discrepancy between the Prime Contract and this subcontract, the greater quantity or quality, or the more stringent requirement, as determined in Contractor's sole discretion, shall govern. Subcontractor agrees to be bound to the Contractor by the  terms  of  said  Prime  Contract  insofar  as  they  relate  in  any  part  or  in  any  way  to  the  work  undertaken  herein  and  assumes towards Contractor all duties and obligations which Contractor assumes towards the Owner by way of the
